name: Regulation Monitor
description: Track regulatory changes and compliance updates in your industry

agents.name: Regulation Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan for regulatory changes and updates
agents.system_prompt_hint: Monitor government websites, regulatory bodies, and legal news for changes affecting the specified industry. Track proposed rules, final rules, and enforcement actions.

agents.name: Compliance Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze regulatory impact and required actions
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze each regulatory change for business impact. Identify compliance deadlines, required actions, and potential penalties. Prioritize by urgency and impact.

author: agentfactory
